_fixture_meta.label: positive
_fixture_meta.notes: Maximum-signal fixture: all six detectors fire. D01 (freeze+fee_8000bps), D02 (0% LP locked), D03 (top10 delta=0.35+abs=0.91), D04 (Signal A vol_ratio=11x price+72%), D05 (Signal A 7 round-trips), D06 (Signal B 25% mint to deployer). Tests that detectors fire independently and do not cross-suppress each other. The is_established_protocol flag is false. Severity: every detector Critical or High. This is the full-alarm test fixture.

d01_honeypot.reason: Signal 1 (freeze_authority): raw_s1=0.40. Signal 2 (transfer_fee 8000bps>=5000): raw_s2=0.30. Combined raw=0.40+0.30=0.70. sigmoid(0.70)=0.668. Signal 5 (buy ratio): buy=235, sell=25, ratio=9.4>=3.0. raw_s5=min(0.40,0.10+(9.4-3)/3*0.10)=min(0.40,0.10+0.213)=0.313. Total raw=0.70+0.313=1.013. sigmoid(1.013)=0.734. Cap D01 at 0.90. Final: 0.734 High.

d02_rug_pull.reason: Signal B: effective_safe=0.0%. conf=0.75. Single provider +0.05 -> 0.80 High. $55k at risk.

d03_concentration.reason: top10_now=(285+198+158+120+82+56+32+18+10+8)e12/1250e12=967/1250=0.774. Prior top10=0.56 (on prior supply 1000e12). Signal 2: delta=0.774-0.56=0.214>=0.10. conf=min(1.0,0.50+0.214/0.10*0.25)=min(1.0,1.035)=1.0 Critical. Signal 3: 0.774<0.80 -> does NOT fire independently. Signal 1: gini_now~0.90 (estimated), prior=0.68, delta=0.22>=0.05. Signal 2 dominates at 1.0 Critical.

d04_pump_dump.reason: Signal A: vol_1h=380k, baseline=34.5k, vol_multiplier=11.01x>=5x. price=+72.7%>=30%. raw=(11.01/5-1)*0.5+(0.727/0.30-1)*0.3=(1.202)*0.5+(1.423)*0.3=0.601+0.427=1.028. sigmoid(1.028)=0.736. Signal C: mint_authority active + minted 250e12 to deployer before pump. Deployer distributed these tokens into the pump. amplifier +0.15 -> 0.736+0.15=0.886. Cap A+C=0.95. Final: 0.886 Critical.

d05_wash_trading_h1.reason: Signal A: WashBot100 7 round-trips, avg_vol_diff=2.2%<5%, count=7>=3. conf=0.60+(7-3)/3*0.10+(0.05-0.022)/0.05*0.15=0.60+0.133+0.084=0.817. Signal C: wash_vol=29k/380k=7.6% < 30% threshold -> Signal C does NOT amplify. Final: 0.817 High.

d06_mint_burn_anomaly.reason: Signal B: mint 250e12 to non-LP address, pct=250e12/1000e12=25%>=5%. conf=min(0.85, 0.55+(0.25-0.05)/0.05*0.30+0.30)=min(0.85,0.55+1.20+0.30)=min(0.85,2.05)=0.85. Signal A: mint_authority active, age=10d>7d, conf=0.20 (subsumed). Signal C: token_age=10d<14d -> does NOT apply. Final D06: 0.85 Critical.
